narrative:
Short impact summary

Scientific Report of the 2025 Dietary Guidelines Advisory Committee: Advisory Report to the Secretary of Health and Human Services and Secretary of Agriculture (2024) in Unknown shows measurable signals of attention across scholarly and online channels. OpenAlex reports 117 citing works, indicating measurable uptake in subsequent scholarship. Crossref Event Data does not currently surface online mentions for this DOI, which is common and not necessarily meaningful on its own. Open access status is not yet resolved in the current pipeline output.

Full narrative

Scientific Report of the 2025 Dietary Guidelines Advisory Committee: Advisory Report to the Secretary of Health and Human Services and Secretary of Agriculture (2024) in Unknown is attributed to the author team. In BookStories, the narrative focuses on what the current metadata can substantiate: scholarly uptake, online traces, and accessibility signals, rather than attempting to infer unobserved reception.

OpenAlex reports 117 citing works, indicating measurable uptake in subsequent scholarship. Interpreting these signals conservatively helps avoid over-reading sparse or uneven coverage across indices, particularly across fields with different citation and publication practices.

Crossref Event Data does not currently surface online mentions for this DOI, which is common and not necessarily meaningful on its own. Event Data is not a proxy for quality; instead it highlights where the DOI is being linked, referenced, or discussed outside formal reference lists, and can be a starting point for qualitative follow-up.

Open access status is not yet resolved in the current pipeline output. Accessibility is often a practical determinant of downstream reuse, including teaching use, replication, meta-analysis, and incorporation into review literature, especially when the best-available full text can be reached directly.

Finally, citation-context services provide a complementary lens on how a paper is used in arguments and evidence chains. scite coverage is not available in the current pipeline output. View scite report.
